## Properties

### id


```tsx
id: 'date-widget'
```


### use


```tsx
use: (node) => {
        if (node.schema.type !== 'string') {
            return false;
        }

        if (node.schema.format === 'time') {
            return true;
        }

        return node.schema.format === 'date' || node.schema.format === 'date-time';
    }
```


### DateWidget


```tsx
Widget: DateWidget
```



## JSON Schema Options


### format


```tsx
format?: string;
```


date and time display format for input field

### seconds


```tsx
seconds?: boolean;
```


for time inputs, show seconds

### liveUpdate


```tsx
liveUpdate?: boolean;
```


if value should update on each keystroke instead of on blur. Defaults to false

### icon


```tsx
icon?: string;
```


### tag


```tsx
tag?: string;
```


### swapIconPosition


```tsx
swapIconPosition?: boolean;
```


### showHeader


```tsx
showHeader?: boolean;
```


if false, will hide title. will hide complete title-header if no menu-actions are available

### widgetMenuItems


```tsx
widgetMenuItems?: WidgetMenuItems;
```


internal option for menu action items
